searchRetrieveResponse.extraResponseData: <facets> <lst name="REPOSITORY_NO"> <int name="R100000136">1</int> </lst> <lst name="NDC"> <int name="3">1</int> </lst> <lst name="ISSUED_DATE"> <int name="1996">1</int> </lst> <lst name="LIBRARY"> </lst> </facets>

record.recordData: <rdf:RDF xmlns:rdf="http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#" xmlns:rdfs="http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#" xmlns:dc="http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/" xmlns:dcterms="http://purl.org/dc/terms/" xmlns:dcndl="http://ndl.go.jp/dcndl/terms/" xmlns:foaf="http://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/" xmlns:owl="http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#" > <dcndl:BibAdminResource rdf:about="https://ndlsearch.ndl.go.jp/books/R100000136-I1970304959831561156"> <dcterms:description>type : book</dcterms:description> <dcndl:bibRecordCategory>R100000136</dcndl:bibRecordCategory> <dcndl:record rdf:resource="https://ndlsearch.ndl.go.jp/books/R100000136-I1970304959831561156#material" /> </dcndl:BibAdminResource> <dcndl:BibResource rdf:about="https://ndlsearch.ndl.go.jp/books/R100000136-I1970304959831561156#material"> <rdfs:seeAlso rdf:resource="http://lccn.loc.gov/95006839"/> <dcterms:identifier rdf:datatype="http://ndl.go.jp/dcndl/terms/USMARCNO">95006839</dcterms:identifier> <dcterms:identifier rdf:datatype="http://ndl.go.jp/dcndl/terms/NIIBibID">BA26925861</dcterms:identifier> <rdfs:seeAlso rdf:resource="http://iss.ndl.go.jp/isbn/0195078241"/><rdfs:seeAlso rdf:resource="http://iss.ndl.go.jp/isbn/9780195132601"/> <dcterms:identifier rdf:datatype="http://ndl.go.jp/dcndl/terms/ISBN">0195078241</dcterms:identifier><dcterms:identifier rdf:datatype="http://ndl.go.jp/dcndl/terms/ISBN">9780195132601</dcterms:identifier> <dcterms:title>The mechanisms of governance : pbk</dcterms:title> <dc:title><rdf:Description> <rdf:value>The mechanisms of governance</rdf:value> </rdf:Description></dc:title> <dcndl:volume><rdf:Description> <rdf:value>: pbk</rdf:value> </rdf:Description></dcndl:volume> <dcterms:creator><foaf:Agent> <foaf:name>Williamson, Oliver E. (Oliver Eaton)</foaf:name> </foaf:Agent></dcterms:creator> <dc:creator>Oliver E. Williamson</dc:creator> <dcterms:publisher><foaf:Agent> <foaf:name>Oxford University Press</foaf:name> </foaf:Agent></dcterms:publisher> <dcndl:publicationPlace rdf:datatype="http://purl.org/dc/terms/ISO3166">us</dcndl:publicationPlace> <dcterms:date>c1996</dcterms:date> <dcterms:issued rdf:datatype="http://purl.org/dc/terms/W3CDTF">1996</dcterms:issued> <dcterms:description>Includes bibliographical references (p. 381-410) and index</dcterms:description><dcterms:description>Date of another pbk. impression: "First issued as an Oxford University Press paperback, 1999" -- T. p. verso</dcterms:description> <dcterms:subject><rdf:Description> <rdf:value>Industrial organization (Economic theory)</rdf:value> </rdf:Description></dcterms:subject><dcterms:subject><rdf:Description> <rdf:value>Corporate governance</rdf:value> </rdf:Description></dcterms:subject><dcterms:subject><rdf:Description> <rdf:value>Transaction costs</rdf:value> </rdf:Description></dcterms:subject> <dcterms:subject rdf:resource="http://id.ndl.go.jp/class/ndc9/335.1"/> <dc:subject rdf:datatype="http://purl.org/dc/terms/LCC">HD2326</dc:subject> <dcterms:language rdf:datatype="http://purl.org/dc/terms/ISO639-2">en</dcterms:language> <dcterms:extent>24 cm</dcterms:extent> <dcndl:materialType rdf:resource="http://ndl.go.jp/ndltype/Book" rdfs:label="図書"/> <dcterms:audience>一般</dcterms:audience> <rdfs:seeAlso rdf:resource="https://ci.nii.ac.jp/ncid/BA26925861"/> <dcterms:relation rdf:resource="https://ci.nii.ac.jp/ncid/BA26925861#entity"/><dcterms:relation rdf:resource="https://lccn.loc.gov/95006839"/> </dcndl:BibResource> <dcndl:BibResource rdf:about="https://ndlsearch.ndl.go.jp/books/R100000136-I1970304959831561156#material"> <dcndl:record rdf:resource="https://ndlsearch.ndl.go.jp/books/R100000136-I1970304959831561156#item" /> </dcndl:BibResource> </rdf:RDF>
